snippet.title: Ben Van Beurden Will Step Down As CEO Of Shell After Almost 10 Years: Wael Sawan Will Become New CEO
snippet.description: Hi, thanks for watching our video about Business News across globe! In this video we'll walk you through: ➡ 0:00 - Intro ➡ 0:06 ...

snippet.title: Returning to Shell shareholders is 2022's priority, says CEO Ben van Beurden
snippet.description: Van Beurden discusses riding the energy price wave, noisy activists, and more.

snippet.title: 🔴 Live: Openbaar verhoor Ben van Beurden (CEO SHELL) - Gaswinning Groningen
Ben Van Beurden Will Step Down As CEO Of Shell After Almost 10 Years: Wael Sawan Will Become New CEO
snippet.description:
Hi, thanks for watching our video about Business News across globe!
In this video we’ll walk you through:
➡ 0:00 - Intro
➡ 0:06 - After ten years as CEO of Shell, Ben van Beurden will step down

After nearly ten years as CEO of Shell, Ben van Beurden will step down at the end of 2022. Wael Sawan, the firm's head of gas and renewables, will take his place. Beurden, who joined Shell in 1983, will serve as a board adviser until June 30, 2023, when he will depart the business. 

Sawan's appointment comes at a critical juncture for the oil giant, which is trying to decrease emissions to net zero by 2050 and transition away from fossil fuels even as Europe relies on them to withstand a rising energy crisis. 

During his tenure, van Beurden oversaw Shell's largest purchase in decades, as well as two significant downturns and a critical drive to reduce carbon emissions - a challenge that will only become more important for his successor.
  
➡ 0:55 Special Reward
